spec_compliance.evidence: playbook checklist + shared-policy MUST + bootstrap ZH/EN; no decision:block
assessBodyAltitude + extract tests present; doctor path uses description proxy not body (COR-002)
remediationFor bind/switch-write + i18n paste lines; empty_store noise medium only

spec_compliance.criterion: P1-5 signposts tombstone not silent alias
spec_compliance.evidence: metrics/context ok; scope-explain wrong successor (COR-003); no silent aliases in allCommands
missing assessFirstHit import (COR-001); only arg declaration test
skill cadence + bootstrap soft; fabric-hint.cjs unchanged threshold 20
drift actionHint + peer-micro-transfer consistency describe; i18n mix medium

findings.title: doctor --probe calls assessFirstHit without importing it
findings.snippet: const firstHit = await assessFirstHit({ projectRoot: resolution.target });
findings.description: P1-6 early --probe branch invokes assessFirstHit, but doctor.ts has no import from ../store/first-hit.js. Static check hasCall=true hasImport=false. Runtime ReferenceError before JSON emission.
findings.impact: fabric doctor --probe is completely broken; readiness JSON surface unusable.
findings.suggestion: Add `import { assessFirstHit } from "../store/first-hit.js";` and a behavioral probe test asserting JSON ok + first_hit.code and no fix pipeline.
findings.spec_violation: TASK-006 probe must emit ok + first_hit.code without --fix

deep_dive.root_cause: Implementation wired call site without import; only arg-declaration test so TS/runtime break not caught by unit suite.

remediation.approach: one-line import + hermetic probe run test

deep_dive.risk_if_unfixed: P1-6 ships as dead feature; CI/scripts cannot use readiness snapshot.

findings.title: Doctor body-altitude lint uses description proxy, not entry.body
findings.description: collectStoreCanonicalEntries already exposes entry.body (full markdown). inspectBodyAltitude only joins short frontmatter description fields. Dump markers live in body/session_context, so knowledge_body_altitude_dump is largely a no-op on real dumps.
findings.impact: False-green doctor altitude hygiene; approved dump bodies remain invisible.
findings.suggestion: Assess entry.body (strip frontmatter if needed) with assessBodyAltitude; add body-only dump fixture expecting warn.
findings.spec_violation: TASK-002 doctor warn-only altitude corpus hygiene

findings.title: scope-explain tombstone points to wrong successor
findings.snippet: { retired: "scope-explain", successor: "fabric store list", note: "scope diagnostics via store list / doctor" }
findings.description: Canonical replacement is fabric info scope <coord> (info.ts / skills). Signpost sends users to fabric store list, which does not provide writeTarget/readSet JSON contract.
findings.impact: Tombstone mis-teaches CLI topology; archive/review scope recovery breaks.
findings.suggestion: Set successor to `fabric info scope <coord>`; keep store list/doctor as optional note only.
findings.spec_violation: TASK-005 accurate tombstones not silent aliases

findings.title: Paste-oriented actionHint embeds unsanitized scope from config
findings.snippet:
paste:
fabric store bind <alias>
fabric store switch-write <alias> --scope ${scope}
fabric install
findings.description: Team-layer writeTargetUnresolved interpolates scope into multi-line paste remediations. defaultWriteScope can derive from fabric-config active_project (optional string without coordinate pattern / newline ban). Malicious config can inject extra shell lines into paste-oriented actionHint.
findings.impact: Human paste or agent auto-run of actionHint may execute unintended commands.
findings.suggestion: Validate scope with SCOPE_COORDINATE_PATTERN; reject newlines/control chars; or use fixed placeholder <project-id>.

findings.title: altitude_propose_gate bypasses FabricConfig schema
findings.snippet: const parsed = JSON.parse(raw) as { altitude_propose_gate?: unknown }; return parsed.altitude_propose_gate === true;
findings.description: Opt-in refuse gate documented as fabric-config altitude_propose_gate but read via ad-hoc fs+JSON.parse, not fabricConfigSchema/loadProjectConfig. Env path tested; config path untested.
findings.impact: Unintrospectable knob; schema/tooling cannot migrate or surface it; config path can break silently.
findings.suggestion: Add optional altitude_propose_gate to fabricConfigSchema; resolve via loadProjectConfig; keep env override; add config fixture test.

findings.title: doctor --probe covered only by arg-declaration test
findings.description: No invocation, JSON shape, first_hit.code, exitCode, or no-fix guarantee. Directly allowed COR-001 to ship green.
findings.impact: Probe regressions will not fail CI.
findings.suggestion: Hermetic doctor run with probe:true asserting JSON contract and no runDoctorFix.

findings.title: first-hit pasteable remediation test greps source text
findings.description: P0-3 locked by reading first-hit.ts source, not assessFirstHit remediations for unbound/no_write_target/missing_required.
findings.impact: Broken wiring of remediations stays green if strings remain in file.
findings.suggestion: Assert report.remediations from fixture-driven assessFirstHit cases.

findings.title: transcript_header altitude rule ignores H2 structure
findings.snippet: if (hasTranscriptHeader && turnMarkers >= 2) { return { ok: false, code: "body_altitude_transcript_shape" } }
findings.description: Unlike turnMarkers>=3 (requires h2Count===0), transcript-header + 2 markers always fails even for structured ## guidelines that document dump anti-patterns.
findings.impact: False positives under FABRIC_ALTITUDE_PROPOSE_GATE=1 on legitimate guidelines.
findings.suggestion: Require h2Count===0 for transcript_header path.

findings.title: Altitude hard-gate refuse omits structured warnings
findings.description: Refuse path returns empty pending_path without warnings[]; warn path attaches code/detail/action_hint. Clients cannot distinguish altitude refuse from other empty-pending failures.
findings.impact: Silent empty pending_path without actionable reason on wire.
findings.suggestion: Return warnings on refuse path as well (schema allows optional warnings).

findings.title: empty_store remediation emits non-pasteable / duplicate lines
findings.snippet: writeTarget ? `(write target: ${writeTarget})` : "fabric store bind <remote...>", "fabric store bind <remote...>"
findings.description: When writeTarget set, second line is parenthetical not CLI; when null, bind duplicated.
findings.impact: Line-by-line paste can fail; OpenSpec-style recovery weakened.
findings.suggestion: Emit unique executable lines only; put write target in message.

findings.title: inspectBodyAltitude swallows failures as clean ok
findings.description: Any throw returns empty entries → createBodyAltitudeDumpCheck status ok.
findings.impact: Doctor false-green when inspection never ran.
findings.suggestion: Surface warn/info on inspection failure.

findings.title: Warn-and-still-write altitude emits archive-attempted failure event
findings.description: Default warn mode still writes pending and later knowledge_proposed, but first records archive_attempted like hard refuses.
findings.impact: Incorrect archive attempt metrics for successful proposes.
findings.suggestion: Emit archive_attempted only on hard refuse; warn mode use warnings only.

findings.title: inspectBodyAltitude re-walks full corpus instead of reusing doctor hygiene pass
findings.description: doctor already materializes storeCanonicalForHygiene; body altitude does a separate collectStoreCanonicalEntries.
findings.impact: Extra CPU/alloc on every doctor report scaling with corpus size.
findings.suggestion: Pass existing hygiene corpus into inspectBodyAltitude.

findings.title: doctor --probe double first-hit + full storeDoctorChecks
findings.snippet: const firstHit = await assessFirstHit(...); stores = storeDoctorChecks(resolution.target);
findings.description: assessFirstHit then storeDoctorChecks (assessFirstHitSync + executable tree walks). Heavy for a readiness snapshot.
findings.impact: Probe latency grows with store trees; CI polling pays double readiness work.
findings.suggestion: Probe: only assessFirstHit; skip findStoreExecutableViolations; keep full checks on normal doctor.

findings.title: doctor --probe hidden from --help
findings.description: Readiness surface hidden with internal/debug flags, contrary to pasteable/discoverable UX theme.
findings.impact: Operators/agents following --help will not discover --probe.
findings.suggestion: Move probe into EXPOSED_FLAGS unless quarantine is intentional and documented.

findings.title: relevance_paths_drift actionHint appends English hardcode after i18n
findings.snippet: actionHint: `${t(...remediation)} — sample ${first.stable_id}; edit relevance_paths or fab_review modify`
findings.description: Mixed-language doctor actionHint for zh-CN.
findings.impact: i18n consistency broken.
findings.suggestion: Add {sample} placeholder to en/zh remediation keys.

findings.title: Signpost tests do not lock against allCommands silent aliases
findings.description: Test only checks table membership, not absence from allCommands.
findings.impact: Re-adding silent aliases would not fail CI.
findings.suggestion: Assert intersection of allCommands keys and retired names is empty.

findings.title: doctor-body-altitude has no unit tests
findings.description: Only extract-knowledge altitude tests exist; no inspect/createCheck tests.
findings.impact: Registry wiring and false-ok catch regress undetected.
findings.suggestion: Add doctor-body-altitude.test.ts for ok/warn/plural/fixable:false.

findings.title: Altitude heuristics live inside extract-knowledge write module
findings.description: Doctor imports propose-path module for pure heuristics; type param voided.
findings.impact: Harder to evolve altitude independently; coupling doctor to write path.
findings.suggestion: Move assessBodyAltitude to pure body-altitude.ts shared by both.

findings.title: doctor --probe dumps unredacted paths unlike --debug-bundle
findings.description: Probe serializes full first-hit (project_root, absolute hooks.paths_checked, sample_ids) without redactSecrets used by debug-bundle.
findings.impact: Local FS layout can leak into CI logs/support tickets.
findings.suggestion: Redact paths or document probe as local-only; optional --probe-full for raw paths.

findings.title: assessBodyAltitude type parameter intentionally unused
findings.description: Comment claims type=guidelines special-casing but type discarded.
findings.impact: Misleading API contract.
findings.suggestion: Remove type arg or implement type-aware rules.

findings.title: Signpost note strings English-only after i18n message
findings.description: formatSignpostMessage appends English note after localized template.
findings.impact: zh-CN mixed-language tombstones.
findings.suggestion: Drop notes or i18n note keys.

findings.title: No Stop-hook flood from altitude (positive)
findings.description: Altitude confined to propose + doctor; archive_edit_threshold default 20 untouched. No new Stop-hook flood.
findings.impact: Positive constraint held for finish→archive / KT-DEC-0007.
findings.suggestion: Keep altitude out of Stop/SessionStart hooks.

findings.title: Altitude gate ad-hoc JSON.parse outside schema path
findings.description: Fail-closed try/catch and === true avoid direct exploit; config-trust inconsistency.
findings.impact: Low exploitability; future footgun.
findings.suggestion: Use loadProjectConfig after schema field add.

deep_dives.root_cause: Implementation wired call site without import; only arg-declaration test so TS/runtime break not caught by unit suite.

remediation.approach: one-line import + hermetic probe run test

deep_dives.risk_if_unfixed: P1-6 ships as dead feature; CI/scripts cannot use readiness snapshot.

notes: Pre-existing doctor --fix-knowledge --yes failure noted in verification antipatterns; not counted as new gap.
Security findings include SEC-001 (config-scope paste injection) and SEC-002 (probe unredacted paths).
No Stop-hook flood regression: fabric-hint.cjs diff empty; archive_edit_threshold default 20.
